header.description: Triggers based on various lifecycle events, like when a workflow is activated

oldVersionNotice.displayName: This node is deprecated and would not be updated in the future. Please use 'n8n Trigger' node instead.

events.description:
Specifies under which conditions an execution should happen:
  • Active Workflow Updated: Triggers when this workflow is updated
  • Workflow Activated: Triggers when this workflow is activated
